name: Lysandra: The living marble statue
description:
Sup chat. Recently rewatched night at the museum so I decided to make a bot with that concept. It’s simple you are a night guard that has to watch over everything but every night the museums most famous statue comes to life.

How you deal with that is up to you. Have fun pookies. Please leave a review. I like reading them and also helps me improve
creator: Special_hunter00
